headline: Is Pentair (PNR) Now At An Attractive Price After The Recent Share Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether Pentair's current share price really reflects its underlying value, you are not alone. This article is designed to help you weigh price against fundamentals in a clear way. Pentair's share price closed at US$90.16, with returns showing a 7.6% decline over the last 7 days, a 7.4% decline over 30 days, a 14.5% decline year to date, a 5.8% gain over 1 year, a 75.0% gain over 3 years, and a 57.8% gain over 5 years. These mixed returns set the backdrop for investor...
